votes.rationale: Expands governance primitives for panels: adds role-specific model slots (Architect/Verifier/Librarian/Operator) and registers corresponding panel types in agent-panels.yaml so bulk instantiation can scale beyond Builder.
Changes are manifest-gated and remain safe by default: new slots stay UNKNOWN until explicitly configured; rubrics keep weight-sum validation; instantiate only scaffolds registered panel IDs.
Unanimous consent satisfied; proceed to ratify. This is the correct next step to make instantiate --all operational at scale while preserving governance boundaries.
